member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterBitRanges
member.summary: Holds the information to decode a single capture for a single controller.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterBitRanges.GetMinMax
member.summary: Returns the min/max bit locations for this capture elemnt.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterBitRanges.Size
member.summary: Gets the Size of this capture.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterBitRanges.GetHryIndexByMemory
member.summary: Gets the HRY index for every Memory.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterInput
member.summary: MBIST Raster JSON configuration.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterInput.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates the MbistRasterInput instance.
member.param: The name of the PList to validate, if empty will validate all plists.
member.returns: List of all the errors in string format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterInput.GetCaptureGroups
member.summary: Gets the list of all capture groups and plists.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterInput.GetSize(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterBitRanges})
member.summary: Gets the number of capture bits in the given capture group.
member.returns: Number of capture bits in the capture group.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterMemory
member.summary: Holds the information for decoding a single Memorys capture.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterPlist
member.summary: Represents the capture data from a single PList.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairElement
member.summary: Class representing a single repair element.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairGroup
member.summary: Repair Group Class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairGroup.MaxIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Finds max index to initialize the shared storage.
member.param: Max index found currently in this GSDS.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairInput
member.summary: MBIST Raster JSON configuration.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairInput.WriteGSDSs(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Write GSDSs.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairInput.GetRepairType(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Given a repair group name, returns the possible repair types.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairInput.IsPrimeInputOutput
member.summary: Returns whether Prime is being used for input/output data format.
member.returns: Whether to output or input from prime.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairInput.CreateInitialGSDS
member.summary: Reset GSDS used for repair to all Xs.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairInput.BuildGSDSFromPrime(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String}@)
member.summary: Build GSDS from Prime VFDM.
member.param: Number of characters to init to.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairInput.BuildLegacyfromDff(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String}@,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.DffService.IDffService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Build GSDS from Prime VFDM.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairInput.BuildLegacyDff(Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService,Prime.DffService.IDffService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Build Legacy DFF from shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairInput.CheckPrimeEnabled
member.summary: Checks if Prime should be enabled in flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairInput.SetupRegisters
member.summary: Return Prime Key.
member.returns: 2 strings being the Namespace and TAG.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairInput.GetGlobalForRepairGroup(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the Global name which holds the fuse values for the given Repair Group.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairInput.HasRepair(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if this Controller has a RepairGroup associated with it.
member.returns: True if there exists a repair group for this controller.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairInput.FindRepairGroup(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the repair group name for the given controller, step and mem. Raises an exeption if one does not exist.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRepairMemoryMap
member.summary: Holds the repair map from the JSON Raster config file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared
member.summary: Static helper functions/enums/stuff for MBIST code.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairType
member.summary: Enum for repair types.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairType.ROW
member.summary: Row Repair.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairType.COL
member.summary: Column Repair.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairType.WORD
member.summary: Word Repair.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairType.BOTH
member.summary: Both Row and Column Repair.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairType.NR
member.summary: No Repair.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairType.NONE
member.summary: No Repair.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairStatus
member.summary: Enum for repair status.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairStatus.AVAIL
member.summary: Repair Element is Available.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairStatus.USED
member.summary: Repair Element is Used.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.CaptureInterLeaveType
member.summary: Enum for how to serialize capture data from multiple pins.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.CaptureInterLeaveType.PinFirst
member.summary: All bits from Pin[0] before Pin[1].

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.CaptureInterLeaveType.CycleFirst
member.summary: First element of each pin, followed by the 2nd element of each pin, etc.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairPriority
member.summary: Gets the order to iterate through repair types. This is to match the Python implentation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.ResolveCapturePins(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: This functions takes a CtvCapturePins from HRY or Repair template and maps it to the CapturePins field from the Json input file. This is so that the json doesn't need IP scoping. For sort/non-intradut this is mostly redundant.
member.param: CtvCapturePins from template (with ip scoping for intradut).
CapturePins field from JSON (does not require ip scoping ever).
member.returns: IP Scoped list of capture pins in the correct order from the JSON input file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.SerializeCaptureData(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.CaptureInterLeaveType)
member.summary: Function to convert the per-pin capture data into a single serialized string. Supports two methods, PinFirst and CycleFirst PinFirst: Data = { Pin1Data[0-x], Pin2Data[0-x], ... } CycleFirst: Data = { Pin1Data[0], Pin2Data[0], ..., Pin1Data[1], Pin2Data[1], ... }.
member.param: Capture data from Prime, Dictionary where Key=PinName, Value=string of capture dat.
List of pins to extract capture data for, must be a subset of the pins in ctvDat.
How to interleave the pindata, either PinFirst or CycleFirs.
member.returns: Single string containing all the serialized capture data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.StringReverse(System.String)
member.summary: Simply reverses a string. This is the quickest way I could find to do it.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.AdjustRange(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Function to adjust a range by a given offset.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RangeToList(System.String)
member.summary: Function to convert a string range into a list of integers. Example ranges: "3,6-8" becomes { 3, 6, 7, 8 }.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RangeSize(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the number of bits in a range.
member.returns: Number of bits in the range.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.SetSubData(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces a substring at the given indexes in the full string.
member.param: Range value giving the index positions in the full string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.ExtractSubData(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Extract substring at the given indexes in the full string.
member.param: Range value giving the index positions in the full string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.GetSubData(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get a substring based on a range (bit locations separated by commas or bitranges using -).
member.param: Indexes of the data to return. ie "1,3,5,9-11,15".

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.GetMbistHRYData(Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the current MBIST HRY string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.SetMbistHRYData(System.String,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes the given string to the MBIST HRY Global.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer
member.summary: Helper class containing fail information.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Object containing the JSON configuration file for raster.
Object containing the JSON configuration file for repair.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.Count
member.summary: Gets the Number of Defects in this FailContainer object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.Contents
member.summary: Gets the Base container for the failure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.FailRows
member.summary: Gets the container to keep track of just the failing rows.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.RepairFails
member.summary: Gets the container to track unrepaired defects.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.MustRepairIO
member.summary: Gets the container for possible repairs.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.RepairedDefects
member.summary: Gets the container for possible repairs.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.RasterConfig
member.summary: Gets the pointer to the JSON Raster file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.RepairConfig
member.summary: Gets the pointer to the JSON Raster file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.Clear
member.summary: Remove everything from this container.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.RepairsNeeded
member.summary: Returns true if there are repairs needed, otherwise False.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.RepairsNeeded(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Returns true if the specified RepairGroup has any defects which need repairs.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.RepairsNeeded(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairType)
member.summary: Returns true if the specified RepairGroup has any defects which need repairs of the specified type.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.FailAddresses(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairType)
member.summary: Gets all the Defects for the specified RepairGroup and Type.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.MarkForRepair(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairType)
member.summary: Assigns defects for repair in the given RepairGroup/Type.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.MarkForRepair(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairType,System.Int32)
member.summary: Assigns the given defect a Repair element.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.GetRepairGroups
member.summary: Gets the names of all the RepairGroups that have defects.

member.summary: Counts the number of repairs needed in the given defect.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.MustRepairIOCheck(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns if .

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.CountNeededRepairs(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistShared.RepairType)
member.summary: Counts the number of repairs needed in the given defect.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.FailingRows(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the number of failing rows for the given memory.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.GetAllControllers
member.summary: Gets a list of all the Controllers.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.GetAllSteps(System.String)
member.summary: Gets all the valid STEP values for the given controller.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.GetAllMems(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets all the valid MemoryIDs for the given controller and step.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailContainer.GetAllFailAddresses(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all the addresses of failures.

member.summary: Records a defect at the given.

member.summary: Base container to hold fail data.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets the Controller name for this failure.

member.summary: Gets the STEP value for this failure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailData.Mem
member.summary: Gets the MemoryID for this failure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailData.Bank
member.summary: Gets the Bank Value (Z address) for this failure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailData.Row
member.summary: Gets the Row Value (X address) for this failure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailData.Col
member.summary: Gets the Column Value (Yaddress) for this failure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailData.Bits
member.summary: Gets the Controller name for this failure.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailData.Add(System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a new failure.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.FailData.GetAllBits
member.summary: Gets all the failing Bits/IOs at this address.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm
member.summary: Main class for MBIST Raster/Repair.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.#ctor(Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService,Prime.FileService.IFileService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: True if this should run in FAFI mode.
True if Repair should be attempted.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.RepairMode
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the algorithm should include repair.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.FailDatabase
member.summary: Gets the FailDatabase.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.DutCollection
member.summary: Gets or sets the uservar collection name for the X,Y identifiers for this DUT (for the TFile).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.DutXGlobal
member.summary: Gets or sets the uservar variable name for the X identifiers for this DUT (for the TFile).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.DutYGlobal
member.summary: Gets or sets the uservar variable name for the Y identifiers for this DUT (for the TFile).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.ControllerStatusFailure
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the Controller Status has failed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.MafFlag
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether an MAF (massive failure) has occurred.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.Repaired
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether Repair has been successful.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.RepairConfig
member.summary: Gets a Repair config file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.MergeFuseValues(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Attempts to combine the fuse values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.PliststoExecute(System.Char[],System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.Int32}})
member.summary: Creating list of plists to run raster on.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.Bin2Hex(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Convert the given binary string to hex.
member.param: True if the string should be reversed befor converting to hex.
If true, hex value will be len'hvalue format. eg 9'h003.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.Bin2dec(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Convert the given binary string to Decimal.
member.param: True if the string should be reversed befor converting.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.IsPrimeRepairenabled
member.summary: Check if Prime Fuse is enabled.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.MbistRaster.MbistRasterAlgorithm.Initialize(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clears out any previously stored data.
member.param: Value for ControllerStatus Flag (defaults to false).
Value for MAF Flag (defaults to false).
Value for Repaired flag (defaults to false).

member.summary: Loads the given JSON config file into the Input structure, returns null on any error.

member.summary: Loads the given JSON config file into the Input structure, returns null on any error.

member.summary: Writes the current FailDatabase to the Raster log (TFile).

member.summary: Decodes a single captures worth of raster data.
member.param: Name of the controller that the data belongs to.
Globally, which capture this is (for FAFI logging).
RasterConfig JSON decoder for this data.
Location of bit 0 within the full ctv string (only used for FAFI printing).
